title: Evaluate markdown component library
description: Assess the existing markdown-transclusion project and plan integration or Go-based alternative for reusable documentation components.

required_inputs.notes: Ensure schema-driven docs compatible with snippet outputs.

notes.author: codex
notes.body: Integrated markdown-transclusion pipeline, added reusable snippets under docs/components, and documented make docs workflow.

notes.author: codex
notes.body: Reorganized @hubless directories, added progress/dependency/status components, wired them into PRD/TechSpec, and added generator unit tests.

notes.author: codex
notes.body: Parameterised dependency graph output and published archived rollups with CI enforcement.

notes.author: codex
notes.body: Mirrored the GitHub Actions toolchain in a Docker wrapper (`scripts/ci-local.sh`) and updated lint/vet steps so contributors can dry-run the full docs pipeline locally.
